tasks.subject: Task 1: SSOT Node Cleanup
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update all three rules files to `Node.js ≥24` and replace hardcoded Node version literals in scaffold SKILL.md files with rules-reference instructions.

**Files:**
- Modify: `.claude/rules/nextjs.md`
- Modify: `.claude/rules/nestjs.md`
- Modify: `.claude/rules/vite-react.md`
- Modify: `skills/nextjs-scaffold/SKILL.md`
- Modify: `skills/nestjs-scaffold/SKILL.md`
- Modify: `skills/vite-react-scaffold/SKILL.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `.claude/rules/nextjs.md` Stack line says `Node.js ≥24`
- [ ] `.claude/rules/nestjs.md` Stack line includes `Node.js ≥24`
- [ ] `.claude/rules/vite-react.md` Stack line includes `Node.js ≥24`
- [ ] No `>=22`, `>=20`, or `>=18` node engine pins remain in scaffold SKILL.md files
- [ ] No `node:24.14-alpine3.23` or patch-pinned Node image tags in scaffold SKILL.md files

**Verify:** `grep -n ">=22\|>=20\|24\.14" skills/nextjs-scaffold/SKILL.md skills/nestjs-scaffold/SKILL.md skills/vite-react-scaffold/SKILL.md` → no output

```json:metadata
{"files": [".claude/rules/nextjs.md", ".claude/rules/nestjs.md", ".claude/rules/vite-react.md", "skills/nextjs-scaffold/SKILL.md", "skills/nestjs-scaffold/SKILL.md", "skills/vite-react-scaffold/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -n \">=22\\|>=20\\|24\\.14\" skills/nextjs-scaffold/SKILL.md skills/nestjs-scaffold/SKILL.md skills/vite-react-scaffold/SKILL.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["rules/nextjs.md says Node.js >=24", "rules/nestjs.md says Node.js >=24", "rules/vite-react.md says Node.js >=24", "No >=22 or >=20 engine pins in scaffold files", "No patch-pinned node:24.14 image tags in scaffold files"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Next.js 16 Correctness
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Document async-only Next.js 16 Request APIs in code standards, and add the better-auth OIDC provider migration note to the auth skill.

**Files:**
- Modify: `skills/nextjs-code-standards/SKILL.md`
- Modify: `skills/nextjs-add-auth/SKILL.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `nextjs-code-standards/SKILL.md` Security section includes async-only Request API rule
- [ ] `nextjs-add-auth/SKILL.md` includes `@better-auth/oauth-provider` callout for OIDC

**Verify:** `grep "Request APIs" skills/nextjs-code-standards/SKILL.md && grep "oauth-provider" skills/nextjs-add-auth/SKILL.md` → one match each

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/nextjs-code-standards/SKILL.md", "skills/nextjs-add-auth/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep \"Request APIs\" skills/nextjs-code-standards/SKILL.md && grep \"oauth-provider\" skills/nextjs-add-auth/SKILL.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["nextjs-code-standards has async-only Request API rule in Security section", "nextjs-add-auth has @better-auth/oauth-provider callout"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: FastAPI and Drizzle Accuracy
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `json=data` guidance to FastAPI code standards (strict Content-Type default), and add Drizzle v1 RC status callout to both database skills.

**Files:**
- Modify: `skills/fastapi-code-standards/SKILL.md`
- Modify: `skills/nextjs-add-database/SKILL.md`
- Modify: `skills/nestjs-add-database/SKILL.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `fastapi-code-standards/SKILL.md` Backend testing section notes `json=data`
- [ ] `nextjs-add-database/SKILL.md` Section A includes Drizzle v1 RC callout
- [ ] `nestjs-add-database/SKILL.md` Section A includes Drizzle v1 RC callout

**Verify:** `grep "json=data" skills/fastapi-code-standards/SKILL.md && grep "release candidate" skills/nextjs-add-database/SKILL.md skills/nestjs-add-database/SKILL.md` → matches in all three files

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/fastapi-code-standards/SKILL.md", "skills/nextjs-add-database/SKILL.md", "skills/nestjs-add-database/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep \"json=data\" skills/fastapi-code-standards/SKILL.md && grep \"release candidate\" skills/nextjs-add-database/SKILL.md skills/nestjs-add-database/SKILL.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["fastapi-code-standards Backend testing includes json=data note", "nextjs-add-database Section A includes Drizzle v1 RC callout", "nestjs-add-database Section A includes Drizzle v1 RC callout"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Vite 8 Accuracy
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a note to vite-react-scaffold explaining that `@vitejs/plugin-react` v6 uses Oxc instead of Babel, so no Babel config or `@babel/core` is needed.

**Files:**
- Modify: `skills/vite-react-scaffold/SKILL.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `vite-react-scaffold/SKILL.md` Generation Conventions includes Oxc note
- [ ] No `babel.config` or `@babel/core` references in the scaffold

**Verify:** `grep "Oxc\|oxc" skills/vite-react-scaffold/SKILL.md` → one match

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/vite-react-scaffold/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep \"Oxc\\|oxc\" skills/vite-react-scaffold/SKILL.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["vite-react-scaffold Generation Conventions has Oxc note for plugin-react v6", "No babel.config or @babel/core in scaffold output"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Version Bump and CHANGELOG
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Bump plugin version from `2.4.0` to `2.5.0` and record all Round 5 changes in `CHANGELOG.md`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `.claude-plugin/plugin.json`
- Modify: `CHANGELOG.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `plugin.json` version is `"2.5.0"`
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` has `[2.5.0]` entry dated 2026-05-07
- [ ] `grep -rn "node:24\.14\|>=22" skills/` returns zero output

**Verify:** `grep '"version"' .claude-plugin/plugin.json && grep '\[2.5.0\]' CHANGELOG.md` → both match

```json:metadata
{"files": [".claude-plugin/plugin.json", "CHANGELOG.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep '\"version\"' .claude-plugin/plugin.json && grep '\\[2.5.0\\]' CHANGELOG.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["plugin.json version is 2.5.0", "CHANGELOG has [2.5.0] entry dated 2026-05-07", "No patch-pinned node image tags remain in scaffold files"]}
```
